__fixture__.name: layout_only_monitor_topology_drift
__fixture__.scenario: A session is restored on a machine whose monitor topology changed: the saved external display is gone and the DPI bucket differs. The window moves to visible primary-display bounds and pane weights are normalized, so the restore is Layout only. Off-screen geometry is treated as a best-effort hint, never as authoritative truth.
doc_sections: UI/UX Spec 6.14 Workspace serialization, portable-state packages, and restore provenance

missing_surface_placeholders.last_known_provenance_label: secondary external display, last known geometry
missing_surface_placeholders.notes: Saved external display was absent; the pane reopened on visible primary-display bounds and its off-screen geometry stayed a best-effort hint.

notes: Layout only. Monitor topology drifted, so off-screen geometry was treated as a best-effort hint and panes were remapped to visible bounds with stable ids preserved.
